title: stylidium longissimum
intro: Stylidium longissimum, also known as the triggerplant, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Stylidiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stylidium longissimum include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Stylidium longissimum is typically harvested and prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with some traditional remedies also utilizing the plant's leaves and stems for topical applications.
